query:
SELECT p.batchNo, SUM(CASE WHEN se.countForProductivity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS countable_complete_events, COUNT(psd.id) AS productivity_details, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(edp.userId, ':', DATE_FORMAT(edp.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d')) ORDER BY edp.userId, edp.businessDate SEPARATOR ', ') AS daily_rows
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN engineer_daily_productivity edp ON edp.userId IN (750192,750136,750212,750189) AND DATE(edp.businessDate) IN ('2026-05-07','2026-05-08','2026-05-11')
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025007','00500025004','00500024968','00500025035','00500025029')
GROUP BY p.batchNo
ORDER BY p.batchNo;

FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN engineer_daily_productivity edp ON edp.userId IN (750192,750136,750212,750189) AND DATE(edp.businessDate) IN ('2026-05-07','2026-05-08','2026-05-11')
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025007','00500025004','00500024968','00500025035','00500025029')
GROUP BY p.batchNo
ORDER BY p.batchNo;
